- DFFlagCLI178641 = True | Mechanism: Enables specific command-line interface features for developers. | Purpose: Improves the development process, allowing for more efficient game updates and features for players.
- DFFlagEnableGetItemInStudio = True | Mechanism: Allows developers to retrieve items directly in the Studio environment. | Purpose: Makes it easier for developers to access and use items while creating games.
- DFFlagFixInExperienceWebViewInsets = True | Mechanism: Adjusts the web view layout to account for insets, improving display. | Purpose: Ensures web content displays correctly within the game interface for a better user experience.
- DFFlagFixRegisterMotors = True | Mechanism: Fixes issues with motor registration in physics. | Purpose: Improves the stability and performance of moving parts in games.
- DFFlagIdempotentDevProductPurchasingEnabled = True | Mechanism: Allows for repeatable and reliable purchases of developer products without errors. | Purpose: Ensures players can buy items multiple times without issues, enhancing their experience.
- DFFlagMathUseNewReflection = True | Mechanism: Implements a new method for calculating reflections in game physics. | Purpose: Enhances realism in games by improving how light and surfaces interact.
- DFFlagMrdSimplifyStatementToTrue = True | Mechanism: Simplifies a statement in the code to always return true. | Purpose: Makes certain features easier to use by removing unnecessary complexity.
- DFFlagPCGDKFixDtorCrash = True | Mechanism: Fixes a crash issue related to the game development kit on PC. | Purpose: Improves stability and prevents unexpected crashes while developing games.
- DFFlagPowerTraceHashFix = True | Mechanism: Fixes issues with the hashing process in power tracing. | Purpose: Ensures more accurate performance tracking for developers and players.
- DFFlagRequestOrchestratorQueueExpirationEnabled = True | Mechanism: Enables expiration for requests in the orchestrator's queue. | Purpose: Helps manage server load by clearing outdated requests, improving responsiveness.
- DFFlagRM3Tier0Trigger = True | Mechanism: Activates a specific feature in the game's resource management system. | Purpose: Improves game performance and resource handling for players.
- DFFlagRM3Tier0Upload = True | Mechanism: Enables a new tier for uploading assets with specific requirements. | Purpose: Allows more players to upload their creations, fostering creativity and content diversity.
- DFFlagSusBumpFSSEnabled = True | Mechanism: Activates a feature related to game performance adjustments. | Purpose: Ensures a smoother gameplay experience for players during high-demand situations.
- DFFlagVideoAdaptionResultMetrics = True | Mechanism: Collects metrics on video adaptation results for analysis. | Purpose: Enhances the quality of video content served to players.
- DFFlagVideoWinHwEncoderActivateSkipUniqueVendorCheck = True | Mechanism: Allows video encoding on Windows without checking for unique hardware vendors. | Purpose: Enables more players to use video features regardless of their hardware.
